name: ifg1000
description: Infinite Flight powered G1000-style avionics emulator.

scripts.dev: npm run electron:install && npm run build:packages && npm --workspace @ifg1000/desktop run dev
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm --workspace @ifg1000/desktop run build
scripts.build:packages: tsc -b packages/shared packages/avionics-core packages/if-connect packages/navdata packages/g1000-ui
